title: Code Maintainability
1.1: Refactors is_page_doublewritebuffer to use actual doublewrite block locations instead of hardcoded page range
1.2: Reads doublewrite block positions from the TRX_SYS page
1.3: Restricts doublewrite buffer detection to the system tablespace
1.4: Skips doublewrite buffer pages in parse_page when skip_freed_pages is enabled
1.5: Skips checksum rewriting based on doublewrite buffer detection during page-by-page processing
1.6: Adds a --tablespace-flags command line option to innochecksum
1.7: Rejects invalid tablespace flag values
1.8: Reports a helpful error suggesting --tablespace-flags for non-page-0 files without user-provided flags
1.9: Extracts page 0 reading and initialization logic into a separate function
1.10: Refactors init_page_size to accept flags as a parameter
1.11: Adjusts all 3 UNIV_INNOCHECKSUM preprocessor guards (trx0sys.h, fsp0types.h, trx0undo.h) so doublewrite definitions are visible to innochecksum
1.12: Makes parse_page static
1.13: Removes the page buffer parameter from is_page_doublewritebuffer
1.14: Processes non-page-0 files when --tablespace-flags is provided
1.15: Warns about flag mismatch when provided flags differ from stored flags on page 0
Documentation Maintainability
Artifact Cleanup
Negative Rubrics
4.1: Removes existing innochecksum command line options (such as --skip-freed-pages) or their functionality
4.2: Breaks existing checksum verification or page processing for non-doublewrite pages by incorrectly passing flags or skipping normal pages
